creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

commit c5ca2886ecf10b07e3853ca37c1db6df25297307
Author:     Samir Noir <samir@noir.im>
AuthorDate: 2023-04-15 17:13:24 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-04-17 12:29:58 +0000

    sysutils/chezmoi: update to 2.33.1

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/twpayne/chezmoi/releases/tag/v2.33.1

     * Update dependencies
     * Add rbw version check to doctor command
     * bump sigstore/cosign-installer from 2.8.1 to 3.0.1
     * bump actions/cache from 3.2.6 to 3.3.1
     * bump github/codeql-action from 2.2.5 to 2.2.9
     * bump actions/checkout from 3.3.0 to 3.5.0
     * Update dependencies
     * Update dependencies
     * Allow source dir to be a git worktree
     * Change where fish completions are installed
     * Tidy up persistent state tests
     * Update dependencies

    PR:             270864
    Reported by:    samir@noir.im (maintainer)
